tools.name: platforms.versionhistoryPlatformsChannelsList
tools.description: Returns list of channels that are available for a given platform.

tools.name: platforms.versionhistoryPlatformsChannelsVersionsList
tools.description: Returns list of version for the given platform/channel.

tools.name: platforms.versionhistoryPlatformsChannelsVersionsReleasesList
tools.description: Returns list of releases of the given version.

tools.name: platforms.versionhistoryPlatformsList
tools.description: Returns list of platforms that are available for a given product. The resource "product" has no resource name in its name.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
